name: scrycast
title: Scrycast
description: Search for Magic: The Gathering cards on Scryfall or your collection
author: aayushpi

commands.name: my-collection
commands.title: Search My Collection
commands.subtitle: Import and search your personal collection
commands.description: Import and browse your ManaBox card collection

commands.name: browse-sets
commands.title: Browse by Set
commands.subtitle: Browse cards organized by set
commands.description: Browse Magic sets and explore the top EDHRec card from each set

commands.name: browse-decks
commands.title: Browse Decks
commands.subtitle: Browse your saved decks
commands.description: Browse preconstructed decks from Moxfield or Archidekt

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use the \`npm run publish\` command.

" && exit 1
